target_display_name: Factory Native Smoke Role Domain Overlay Build Pack v1
materialization_reason: Create a bounded proving-ground build-pack that composes the new role/domain overlay system with an existing personality overlay.

personality_template_selection.selection_reason: Use the established business-partner tone layer so the proving-ground pack exercises overlay composition rather than a role/domain-only path.

role_domain_template_selection.selection_reason: Use the new startup-operator role/domain lens to prove problem-framing and task-heuristic guidance composes cleanly with the personality overlay.
